mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, username, endpoint, p256dh_key, auth_secret, user_agent, created_at, last_pushed_at, last_seen_at
mapper.insert: insert into batch.console_push_subscription (tenant_id, username, endpoint, p256dh_key, auth_secret, user_agent, last_seen_at) values (#{tenantId}, #{username}, #{endpoint}, #{p256dhKey}, #{authSecret}, #{userAgent}, now()) on conflict (tenant_id, username, endpoint) do update set p256dh_key = excluded.p256dh_key, auth_secret = excluded.auth_secret, user_agent = excluded.user_agent, last_seen_at = excluded.last_seen_at
